summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FleetLock AI-Powered Parametric Income Insurance application (Iteration 2). All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly with new Bearer token authentication, Level-1/2/3 plan naming, weather integration, and updated landing page.
passed_tests: Admin login with Bearer token authentication
Worker login with Bearer token authentication
Auth /me endpoint verification for both roles
Admin dashboard with stats and charts
Admin weather tab with zone cards and polling
Admin ML insights with 3 model cards
Landing page hero, features, plans sections
Insurance plans page with payout calculator
File claim functionality in worker dashboard
